{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Videographer / Video Editor",
  "description": "Castel Resources Consultancy Limited - We unlock your business&#39;s full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Videographer / Video Editor

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative and talented Videographer to capture, produce, and edit high-quality visual content that enhances our brand and engages our audience.
	The ideal candidate should have a strong eye for storytelling, excellent technical skills, and experience creating content for digital and social media platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, shoot, and edit high-quality videos for marketing campaigns, events, social media, and corporate communications.
	Operate cameras, lighting, audio, and other production equipment.
	Produce engaging promotional videos, interviews, documentaries, and event coverage.
	Collaborate with the marketing and creative teams to develop compelling visual concepts.
	Edit videos by adding graphics, music, subtitles, and special effects where necessary.
	Ensure all video content aligns with the company&#39;s brand identity and quality standards.
	Organize, store, and manage video footage and production assets.
	Stay updated with the latest videography techniques, equipment, and social media trends.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc Degree in Mass Communication, Film Production, Multimedia, or a related field (preferred)
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience as a Videographer
	Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software
	Strong knowledge of camera operation, lighting, framing, and audio recording
	Experience creating content for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, and other digital platforms
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously
	A portfolio of previous work is required


Key Skills:


	Videography &amp; Camera Operation
	Video Editing &amp; Post-Production
	Lighting &amp; Audio Setup
	Creative Storytelling
	Content Production for Social Media
	Time Management &amp; Attention to Detail


Preferred Candidate:


	Creative, innovative, and passionate about visual storytelling.
	Strong understanding of current social media content trends.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines while maintaining high-quality output.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: castelhrjobs@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

Videographer / Video Editor Job at Castel Resources Consultancy Limited




        
    

        
        Castel Resources Consultancy Limited - We unlock your business's full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Videographer / Video Editor
     

            
    



Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative and talented Videographer to capture, produce, and edit high-quality visual content that enhances our brand and engages our audience.
	The ideal candidate should have a strong eye for storytelling, excellent technical skills, and experience creating content for digital and social media platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, shoot, and edit high-quality videos for marketing campaigns, events, social media, and corporate communications.
	Operate cameras, lighting, audio, and other production equipment.
	Produce engaging promotional videos, interviews, documentaries, and event coverage.
	Collaborate with the marketing and creative teams to develop compelling visual concepts.
	Edit videos by adding graphics, music, subtitles, and special effects where necessary.
	Ensure all video content aligns with the company's brand identity and quality standards.
	Organize, store, and manage video footage and production assets.
	Stay updated with the latest videography techniques, equipment, and social media trends.


Requirements


	HND / B.Sc Degree in Mass Communication, Film Production, Multimedia, or a related field (preferred)
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience as a Videographer
	Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software
	Strong knowledge of camera operation, lighting, framing, and audio recording
	Experience creating content for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, and other digital platforms
	Ability to  work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously
	A portfolio of previous work is required


Key Skills:


	Videography & Camera Operation
	Video Editing & Post-Production
	Lighting & Audio Setup
	Creative Storytelling
	Content Production for Social Media
	Time Management & Attention to Detail


Preferred Candidate:


	Creative, innovative, and passionate about visual storytelling.
	Strong understanding of current social media content trends.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines while maintaining high-quality output.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Developer",
  "description": "Jobvet Services is a leading staffing and recruitment agency based in Abuja, specializing in sourcing top-tier candidates from the APAC region. We are committed to connecting talent with opportunity and helping businesses grow by finding the right fit for their teams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Developer

Job Location: Wuse Zone 4, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking a results-driven and proactive Business Developer to join a growing restaurant business in Wuse Zone 4, Abuja.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving revenue growth, identifying new business opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and implementing initiatives that increase the restaurant&#39;s customer base and market presence.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to increase sales and revenue.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients, partners, and key stakeholders.
	Create and execute business development strategies to expand the restaurant&#39;s market reach.
	Generate leads and convert prospects into long-term customers.
	Negotiate business deals, partnerships, and contracts.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with the marketing and operations teams to implement promotional campaigns.
	Prepare regular reports on sales performance, business opportunities, and market trends.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	Proven experience as a Business Developer or in a similar business development role.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Demonstrated ability to meet and exceed sales targets.
	Excellent networking and relationship management skills.
	Must be self-motivated, proactive, and results-oriented.
	Applicants must currently reside in Abuja.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Jobvet24@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Developer Job at Jobvet Services




        
    

        
        Jobvet Services is a leading staffing and recruitment agency based in Abuja, specializing in sourcing top-tier candidates from the APAC region. We are committed to connecting talent with opportunity and helping businesses grow by finding the right fit for their teams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Developer

Job Location: Wuse Zone 4, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are seeking a results-driven and proactive Business Developer to join a growing restaurant business in Wuse Zone 4, Abuja.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving revenue growth, identifying new business opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and implementing initiatives that increase the restaurant's customer base and market presence.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to increase sales and revenue.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients, partners, and key stakeholders.
	Create and execute business development strategies to expand the restaurant's market reach.
	Generate leads and convert prospects into long-term customers.
	Negotiate business deals, partnerships, and contracts.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.
	Collaborate with the marketing and operations teams to implement promotional campaigns.
	Prepare regular reports on sales performance, business opportunities, and market trends.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	Proven experience as a Business Developer or in a similar business development role.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Demonstrated ability to meet and exceed sales targets.
	Excellent networking and relationship management skills.
	Must be self-motivated, proactive, and results-oriented.
	Applicants must currently reside in Abuja.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Administrative Assistant Job at Iraizickify Business Store




        
    

        
        Iraizickify Business Store is a reliable ICT and business support service provider specializing in company and business registration under the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) in Nigeria. We are committed to helping entrepreneurs, startups, and established businesses formalize and grow their ventures with ease and professionalism.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Answer and direct phone calls
	Organize and schedule appointments
	Plan meetings and take detailed minutes
	Write and distribute email, correspondence memos, letters, faxes and forms
	Assist in the preparation of regularly scheduled reports
	Develop and maintain a filing system
	Update and maintain office policies and procedures
	Order office supplies and research new deals and suppliers
	Maintain contact lists
	Book travel arrangements
	Submit and reconcile expense reports
	Provide general support to visitors
	Act as the point of contact for internal and external clients
	Liaise with executive and senior administrative assistants to handle requests and queries from senior managers


Requirements and skills


	High School Degree; additional qualification as an Administrative assistant or Secretary will be a plus
	Proven experience as an Administrative Assistant, Virtual Assistant or Office Admin Assistant
	Knowledge of office management systems and procedures
	Working knowledge of office equipment, like printers and fax machines
	Proficiency in MS Office (MS Excel and MS PowerPoint, in particular)
	Excellent time management skills and the ability to prioritize work
	Attention to detail and problem solving skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong organizational skills with the ability to multi-task.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Audit Officer",
  "description": "Proforce Industries Limited was incorporated in 2008 as a total defence solution provider specializing in armoured vehicles and personal protection. The company&rsquo;s focus is on the delivery of confidence in protective mobility. We have developed a vibrant market for security and mobile protective products within Nigeria and Africa. PROFORCE has exploited its deep technical know-how to produce outstanding armored products for Government Agencies, Corporate Bodies, Diplomatic Communities and Private individuals within Nigeria and Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Audit Officer

Job Location: No 1 Akaka Road - Ode Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a diligent, analytical, and detail-oriented Internal Audit Officer to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for evaluating and improving the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management processes, compliance procedures, and operational efficiency within the organization.
	The role requires a high level of integrity, professionalism, and strong auditing skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct periodic audits of financial, operational, and administrative activities across the organization.
	Evaluate internal control systems and recommend improvements where necessary.
	Review company policies, procedures, and processes to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and internal standards.
	Identify operational, financial, and compliance risks and recommend mitigation measures.
	Verify the accuracy of financial records, inventory records, and operational reports.
	Conduct stock, asset, and inventory audits within production and warehouse operations.
	Prepare audit reports detailing findings, recommendations, and corrective actions.
	Follow up on audit observations and ensure implementation of agreed corrective actions.
	Assist in fraud prevention, detection, and investigation activities.
	Support management in strengthening governance and risk management practices.
	Maintain confidentiality of audit information and company records.
	Perform other audit-related duties as assigned by management.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, Economics, or a related field.
	3 &ndash; 5 years of relevant experience in Internal Audit, External Audit, Risk Management, or Compliance within a manufacturing or industrial environment.
	Professional certifications such as ACA, ACCA, CIA, ANAN, or equivalent will be an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of auditing principles, risk management, and internal control frameworks.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel.
	Excellent analytical, investigative, and report-writing skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	High level of integrity, confidentiality, and professionalism.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively with cross-functional teams.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Professional development and career advancement opportunities.
	A dynamic and professional working environment.
	Opportunity to contribute to organizational excellence and continuous improvement.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and Cover Letter to: hr@proforcedefence.com and copy: hrm@proforcedefence.com using &quot;Application for Internal Audit Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Internal Audit Officer Job at Proforce Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Proforce Industries Limited was incorporated in 2008 as a total defence solution provider specializing in armoured vehicles and personal protection. The company’s focus is on the delivery of confidence in protective mobility. We have developed a vibrant market for security and mobile protective products within Nigeria and Africa. PROFORCE has exploited its deep technical know-how to produce outstanding armored products for Government Agencies, Corporate Bodies, Diplomatic Communities and Private individuals within Nigeria and Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Audit Officer

Job Location: No 1 Akaka Road - Ode Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Job Summary


	We are seeking a diligent, analytical, and detail-oriented Internal Audit Officer to join our team.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for evaluating and improving the effectiveness of internal controls, risk management processes, compliance procedures, and operational efficiency within the organization.
	The role requires a high level of integrity, professionalism, and strong auditing skills.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct periodic audits of financial, operational, and administrative activities across the organization.
	Evaluate internal control systems and recommend improvements where necessary.
	Review company policies, procedures, and processes to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and internal standards.
	Identify operational, financial, and compliance risks and recommend mitigation measures.
	Verify the accuracy of financial records, inventory records, and operational reports.
	Conduct stock, asset, and inventory audits within production and warehouse operations.
	Prepare audit reports detailing findings, recommendations, and corrective actions.
	Follow up on audit observations and ensure implementation of agreed corrective actions.
	Assist in fraud prevention, detection, and investigation activities.
	Support management in strengthening governance and risk management practices.
	Maintain confidentiality of audit information and company records.
	Perform other audit-related duties as assigned by management.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, Economics, or a related field.
	3 – 5 years of relevant experience in Internal Audit, External Audit, Risk Management, or Compliance within a manufacturing or industrial environment.
	Professional certifications such as ACA, ACCA, CIA, ANAN, or equivalent will be an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of auditing principles, risk management, and internal control frameworks.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel.
	Excellent analytical, investigative, and report-writing skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	High level of integrity, confidentiality, and professionalism.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively with cross-functional teams.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Professional development and career advancement opportunities.
	A dynamic and professional working environment.
	Opportunity to contribute to organizational excellence and continuous improvement.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] and copy: [email protected] using "Application for Internal Audit Officer" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
